name: Cloud Service Discovery
description: Adversaries enumerate available cloud services and configurations to understand the target environment and identify opportunities for exploitation or data access. In Azure/Entra ID, this includes enumerating subscriptions, resource providers, deployed services, Key Vault contents, storage account names, function apps, and Logic Apps. AuditLogs captures Entra ID-level discovery while AzureActivity covers ARM-level service enumeration. Adversaries map discovered services to plan subsequent data access or privilege escalation attacks.
iocs: AzureActivity bulk read of 'MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT/VAULTS/READ' across multiple resource groups — Key Vault discovery
AzureActivity 'MICROSOFT.STORAGE/STORAGEACCOUNTS/READ' listing all storage accounts across subscriptions
AzureActivity 'MICROSOFT.WEB/SITES/READ' and 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC/WORKFLOWS/READ' — function app and Logic App enumeration
AuditLogs high volume 'List keys', 'List secrets' operations against Key Vault from a single identity
AzureActivity 'MICROSOFT.INSIGHTS/COMPONENTS/READ' enumerating Application Insights instances — discovers application dependencies
AzureActivity reading all resource provider capabilities: 'MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/PROVIDERS/READ' — maps all available services
Sequence of AzureActivity operations mapping service dependencies: storage → function app → service bus — intent to understand data pipeline
evasion_variants: Use Azure Resource Graph with a single query to enumerate all resources across subscriptions rather than individual ARM reads
Enumerate only services relevant to the attack objective (e.g., only storage accounts and Key Vaults for data exfiltration) to minimize operation count
Perform discovery operations as part of a legitimate-looking automation runbook in an Azure Automation Account
Use a Managed Identity assigned to a compromised VM to perform discovery — avoids external IP attribution in AzureActivity
Target the Azure cost management API to infer deployed services from billing data without triggering resource read operations
Read Azure Resource Manager deployment templates (DEPLOYMENTS/READ) to enumerate all services from a single infrastructure-as-code artifact
detection_kql_hints: AzureActivity | where OperationNameValue has_any ('KEYVAULT/VAULTS/READ','STORAGE/STORAGEACCOUNTS/READ','WEB/SITES/READ','LOGIC/WORKFLOWS/READ') | summarize dcount(OperationNameValue) by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | where dcount_OperationNameValue > 3
AuditLogs | where OperationName in ('List keys','List secrets','List certificates') | summarize count() by tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), bin(TimeGenerated, 10m) | where count_ > 10
AzureActivity | where OperationNameValue == 'MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/PROVIDERS/READ' | project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress
AzureActivity | where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success' | summarize dcount(ResourceProviderValue) by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | where dcount_ResourceProviderValue > 5
AzureActivity | where OperationNameValue has 'DEPLOYMENTS/READ' | summarize count() by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | where count_ > 5
